description_long: This is a heavy-duty concrete jersey barrier, commonly used for traffic control and safety in urban environments. The barrier is rectangular with a sloped top and features two metal lifting hooks embedded on the upper surface for transport. Its surface is weathered, showing signs of exposure to the elements, with visible stains and minor scuffs. Along the lower portion of the barrier, there is a yellow band with diagonal black stripes, serving as a high-visibility warning marking. The base has two rectangular cutouts, likely for forklift access or drainage. The overall appearance is utilitarian, designed for durability and visibility in high-traffic areas.
description: A weathered concrete jersey barrier with yellow and black diagonal warning stripes, metal lifting hooks, and visible surface wear.
description_view_0: Narrow end view showing the sloped top, yellow and black warning stripes, and the thickness of the barrier.
description_view_1: Full side view displaying the rectangular face, two metal lifting hooks, yellow and black diagonal stripes, and surface wear.
description_view_2: Opposite narrow end view, similar to view 0, highlighting the sloped top and warning stripes.
description_view_3: Opposite full side view, mirroring view 1, with visible lifting hooks, warning stripes, and weathered surface.
